title: cardamine caledonica var. brevistyla
intro: Cardamine caledonica var. brevistyla, also known as lesser bittercress, is a perennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cardamine caledonica var. brevistyla can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
